summary: Created strongly-typed dataset definitions for the 404 Museum generator: types.ts with Era/Region/Archetype/DesignCues interfaces, 5 eras (early-web through alt-timeline), 3 regions (US/Germany/UK with German vocabulary overrides), 8 archetypes (budget-airline through personal-homepage) with era/region compatibility, and a barrel export. All 27 tests pass including typecheck, cardinality, referential integrity, and snapshot stability.
